display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a TV news presenter is found strangled in her pool, Neville is sure that her popular co-host is guilty.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the sleuth on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. When a marine salvage hunter is killed, all the evidence seems to point to one man with a perfect alibi.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After a mill owner is found dead, an old friend of the parish team asks Father Brown to investigate.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric from the mind of GK Chesterton. Brown investigates a group of people all seeking to reinvent themselves.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a TV news presenter is found strangled in her pool, Neville is sure that her popular co-host is guilty.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Aunt Miranda and her friends are caught investigating an investment fraud scheme, Charlie must find the culprit before the amateur detectives pay with their lives.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch joins the Gold Rush in the Yukon and meets radical author Jack London.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch must tread carefully when he pursues a Catholic suspect of the murder of an Alderman.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and his colleagues attend a charity basketball game where the coach is murdered.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Violet Hart investigates when a protester dies at an event for civil rights.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates when a Japanese spy is found dead in a Korean-family's cellar.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: A violent psychiatric patient is on the loose, leaving behind a murder, a mystery and an unidentified body. Blake hires Eliza to help him solve the case.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: The divorce of a high society couple causes scandal when their settlement becomes public. Their prize racehorse goes missing - and each party blames the other.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the sleuth on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. When a marine salvage hunter is killed, all the evidence seems to point to one man with a perfect alibi.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth must stop a much-loved institution from going off the rails when the local stationmaster is murdered. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthy's friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set drama, starring Mark Williams.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest spies trouble when Lady Felicia returns to Kembleford from Africa, having split from her lover Benedict Northam. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mallory is forced to turn to the sleuthing priest for help when a senior member of the police force is murdered at a bowls match.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: I.P. Tide: Brilliant DI Mackenzie Clarke leaves London and returns to her hometown of Dolphin Cove in Australia, just in time for a local man to wash ashore with a knife in his back.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mackenzie Clarke faces two big mysteries: the murder of a wellness influencer during a fun run, and how to stop local bathers taking short-cuts through her property.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the sleuth on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. When a marine salvage hunter is killed, all the evidence seems to point to one man with a perfect alibi.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown joins forces with Chief Inspector Valentine to uncover a dark secret at Helmsley House.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the sleuth on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. The team is faced with an impossible murder when a young backpacker is shot inside a sealed room.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth must stop a much-loved institution from going off the rails when the local stationmaster is murdered. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming tackles the fast-flowing River Trent and is invited to join a night-time illuminated boat parade.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming faces a journey of many challenges as he runs aground and breaks down in Nottingham.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and his son Charlie head to Leicestershire to collect a vintage Albion truck. Steeped in nostalgia, both Paul and Charlie fall for the Albion's charms.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave travels to leafy Leicestershire where Steve Perry has a 1980 Ford Granada Ghia and a 1981 Ford Cortina.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek and Paul are off to Leeds on a rare father and son road trip to pick up a VW Cabriolet and a Lotus Elite.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Wales, Henry Cole converts a Royal Enfield motorbike into a classic cafe racer and Simon O'Brien gets an 1980s pinball machine back to its best.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Dragons' Den star Sara Davies takes Robson gorge-walking in Teesdale as the actor continues his mission to find new ways of spending time in the great outdoors.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson plays host to Grantchester co-star Tom Brittney on a road trip around County Durham where the pair are on a mission to find peace and relaxation in the countryside.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A juggernaut of Soviet engineering which was crucial to the international space race. Deserted Scottish coastal defences and a complex that's crucial to American history.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The mysterious Cachtice Castle home to Elizabeth Bathory, said to have killed over 600 girls and a mysterious structure on the 38th parallel.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore Kings Cross St Pancras, including a secret siding and the disused Thameslink station.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the brand new Elizabeth Line and have access to two of its stations weeks before the line opens.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy visit Quainton Road in Buckinghamshire, 50 miles from London - and once on the underground. Siddy also explores Kingsway tramway tunnel.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway visit the cathedral-like Greenwich Power Station, which stands ready to power the tube at short notice.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus take on a Mazda MX-5 that's been given some real boy racer attitude, hoping to return it to its former glory.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus track down a 1980s Austin Metro. It's cheap, it's clean and it's bright yellow - and they have high hopes to treble their money.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents a guide to the lives of plants in environments around the world, beginning with the plant battlegrounds of the tropical rainforests.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents a guide to the world of plants that grow in water, including a river in Brazil, where the plants have created their own atmosphere.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: The strategy, deception and feats of engineering plants use to thrive in the changing weather of different seasons.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: Plants that have developed to thrive in the desert, including cacti that grow in the shade of other trees and collect water in pleated trunks.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: A guide to plants that thrive in human-dominated environments, including trees that grow across canyons in India, which have developed into living bridges.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Father and son duo Paul and Charlie are off on a road trip to Northampton, to extract a Daimler Sovereign, and a Sunbeam Alpine and that's been languishing in a garag.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's winging his way to Bingley to meet a kindred spirit who's parting with his TR7 after 32 years. Paul and Charlie head to Anglesey to collect a pair of L.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: MG Magnette/Morris Minor/De Tomaso Longchamp/Ford Escort Rally Car: Derek collects a pair of stylish British classics from a Yorkshire workshop, with the Morris 1000 finding a new home with a 10-year.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's charmed by a 1929 Rolls Royce Phantom with an unusual history, involving a WW1 hero and a tale of fraud.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's got his work cut out collecting a huge haul that includes two Bentleys, a Daimler and a traditional Bowtop caravan.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Innovative training produces skilled veterinarians for primary industries; a century of farming on Waikato’s Limestone Downs; and a dairy conversion supports a positive future for Limestone Downs.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A Hawke’s Bay horse breeder and trainer continues his family’s respected racing legacy, while encouraging the next generation into the industry.

programme.title: Well Traveller
programme.desc: The team head to Byron Bay, where Turia Pitt guides James, a 43yr old busy father and CEO, through wellness experiences designed to help him restore balance and energy. S2 E2

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa present an ideal Twixmas menu with dishes that include a Christmas spiced apple and ginger cheesecake with popping candy to start any New Year with a bang.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Rick explores the Riverina, where people have reinvented their lives and the landscape, to create the nation’s “food bowl”.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Martin makes incredible furniture, but needs to boost his business and sales skills to thrive. Charlotte quit her job to commit to a career in stained glass, but will she succeed?

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Mail thieves on the run in Te Puna, drinking while driving, and an hour after being disqualified for dangerous speed a driver is back behind the wheel.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: How would you fare against Tom Gleeson? Play along with the hashtag #HardQuiz. Tonight’s expert topics: Bram Stoker’s Dracula, Hillary Clinton, Indian cricketer Virat Kohli, and Gibson Guitars!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: The third live Semi Final of Britains Got Talent 2026, who will impress enough to make it to this year's final?

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Eighteen months after a life-changing tragedy, Jim Bergerac returns to duty to investigate a groom found dead at a high-profile Jersey wedding. S2 E1

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.desc: Maggie reveals her plans on having a baby as Claire begins to struggle with the hardships of motherhood. S1 E4

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Olympia and the team take on a client who is fighting to gain full control of an AI afterlife software company she developed with her late sister. S2 E13

programme.title: Kidnapped: The Chloe Ayling Story
programme.desc: Trapped in the farmhouse, Chloe tries to establish a connection with MD in order to ensure her safety. But can she rely on him to protect her from her imminent fate? S1 E2

programme.title: House Of Gods
programme.desc: Series Premiere: An elite Iraqi Australian family navigates newfound authority and prestige following the historic election of the patriarch, Sheikh Mohammad, as the supreme Head Cleric. S1 E1

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Dordogne, Nick and Nicole begin major renovations on their château, while Erin and JB are desperately trying to complete the renovations of their turret art room.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Innovative training produces skilled veterinarians for primary industries; a century of farming on Waikato’s Limestone Downs; and a dairy conversion supports a positive future for Limestone Downs.

programme.title: Barkley Manor
programme.desc: Season Final: It's the end of the school year at Barkley Manor. Plus, there's mayhem at the country park. S1 E10

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: On the Isle of Man, Susan explores the island's rich Viking heritage, visits the world's oldest continuous parliament, samples the popular kipper and lime marmalade bap.

programme.title: Ranginui: Call Of The Ice
programme.desc: RANGINUI: Call of the Ice' follows Māori astronomer Rangi Matamua and language expert Mataia Keepa into Antarctica's winter darkness, where science and Indigenous knowledge reveal a hidden world.

programme.title: Waka Huia
programme.desc: Waka Huia is an iconic archival documentary series recording the unique stories and histories of Maori for all New Zealanders.

programme.title: We Are Rātana
programme.desc: In 1918 the Rātana Faith was started by T.W Rātana. But how are the Rātana faithful and the community faring now? A heartfelt and contemporary look at the Rātana way of life.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The new batch of bakers elevate a loaf cake, tackle a Technical with a twist and make bamboozling illusion cakes. Whose cake fakery will earn them the first Star Baker award?

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and her mother argue about a fur coat she inherited. S2 E12

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: Tokelauan soul artist Romi Wright takes us on set of her latest music video, Fresh Feeds tests if we can eat for $20 in Fiji and Village Knock out is back!

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody spirals.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: As the ghosts continue searching for Mr. Martin inside Split River High, Maddie worries about her future. S2 E2

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: Tensions mount as the passengers are given the opportunity to scupper each other in a challenge that will test their memory and their reflexes, as well as their loyalty to each other. S1 E7

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: City teenager Ren MacCormack moves to a small town where rock music and dancing have been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace. Stars Julianne Hough. (2011)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon petitions Wil Wheaton to appear on the new Professor Proton show - but in a surprising turn of events, Wil offers a role to Amy instead! S11 E15

programme.title: The Lost World - Jurassic Park
programme.desc: A research team is sent to the Jurassic Park Site B island to study the dinosaurs there, while an InGen team approaches with another agenda. Starring Jeff Goldblum and Julianne Moore. (1997)

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A lazy middle school teacher who hates her job and her students is forced to return to teaching to make enough money for a boob job after she is dumped. Stars Cameron Diaz and Justin Timberlake.(2011)

programme.title: Fresh Eggs
programme.desc: Lulu suspects foul play and declares war - on the wrong target. Wade’s hunt for their escaped hostage comes to an unexpected climax. Wade and Penny return to a shocking situation. S1 E3

programme.title: Citadel
programme.desc: As Kyle and Nadia land at an old safehouse, small clues about their past life together bubble to the surface. S1 E3

programme.title: C*A*U*G*H*T
programme.desc: Four Australian soldiers are sent on a secret mission to a war-torn country. Mistaken for Americans, they are captured by freedom fighters and produce a viral hostage video. S1 E1

programme.title: Superman & Lois
programme.desc: Reeling from failure, Jordan begins to spiral; Jonathan discovers newfound strength; Gen. Lane recruits John Henry and Natalie Irons, before making a choice that will change everything. S4 E3

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: Tokelauan soul artist Romi Wright takes us on set of her latest music video, Fresh Feeds tests if we can eat for $20 in Fiji and Village Knock out is back!

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother/sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: Night Eyes
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of four film crews in their investigations of the various paranormal events that occur in their local area and their mission to help the locals deal with their ghostly problems.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Join the exciting time travelling adventures with Josh, Rangi, Kura, Toro, Tiare and Hikuroa as they set sail across the motu to find all the godsticks to get him back to the future to save the rohe.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: Host Carson Daly reveals who America has chosen to be the Season 28 winner; the finale includes special performances by superstar artists that include Khalid and XG.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Sonny’s web of lies deepens. Harper and Beau are all loved up. David covers his trauma.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Sitcom about a close-knit family and their struggle to make ends meet. Lilo Lill returns to pursue Freddie and tell him some sad news. Joey rents a shop to sell his organic produce.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Laughs and japes in the show about the Liverpudlian family scraping a living any way they can. A photographer takes advantage of Aveline, while Jack dabbles in art.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom, the most popular show of its era. When Freddie's seafaring brother dies, the Boswells decide on a burial at sea.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom which topped the ratings in the 1980s. Adrian is out of a job. Aveline bares all on the front cover of a magazine. And Freddie is in debt.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Sitcom about a working class Liverpudlian family, from the writer of The Liver Birds and Butterflies. A new resident in the street causes consternation for the Boswells.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a family of loveable Liverpudlian rogues. Aveline has had a baby, and Leonora offers Adrian a job as her personal assistant.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Sitcom about a close-knit family and their struggle to make ends meet. Lilo Lill returns to pursue Freddie and tell him some sad news. Joey rents a shop to sell his organic produce.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Laughs and japes in the show about the Liverpudlian family scraping a living any way they can. A photographer takes advantage of Aveline, while Jack dabbles in art.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom, the most popular show of its era. When Freddie's seafaring brother dies, the Boswells decide on a burial at sea.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom which topped the ratings in the 1980s. Adrian is out of a job. Aveline bares all on the front cover of a magazine. And Freddie is in debt.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Sitcom about a working class Liverpudlian family, from the writer of The Liver Birds and Butterflies. A new resident in the street causes consternation for the Boswells.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a family of loveable Liverpudlian rogues. Aveline has had a baby, and Leonora offers Adrian a job as her personal assistant.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Sitcom about a close-knit family and their struggle to make ends meet. Lilo Lill returns to pursue Freddie and tell him some sad news. Joey rents a shop to sell his organic produce.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Laughs and japes in the show about the Liverpudlian family scraping a living any way they can. A photographer takes advantage of Aveline, while Jack dabbles in art.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom, the most popular show of its era. When Freddie's seafaring brother dies, the Boswells decide on a burial at sea.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom which topped the ratings in the 1980s. Adrian is out of a job. Aveline bares all on the front cover of a magazine. And Freddie is in debt.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Schindler's Ark in the Czech Republic, a secret refuge in Europe's killing fields, and a lost Amazonian paradise deep in the Brazilian rainforest.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring decaying remains of Old Essex County Jail in New Jersey, a facility that became a powder keg of injustice that was set to explode.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Hunt for the Nazi Gold Train: Exploring the Polish city of Walbrzych, where a fairy-tale castle on a cliff conceals a vast subterranean tunnel network linked to a legend of lost Nazi gold.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Fort Sherman, a jungle stronghold in Panama built to defend a prized American possession that soon faced the threat of an elaborate Nazi conspiracy.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Schindler's Ark in the Czech Republic, a secret refuge in Europe's killing fields, and a lost Amazonian paradise deep in the Brazilian rainforest.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring decaying remains of Old Essex County Jail in New Jersey, a facility that became a powder keg of injustice that was set to explode.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Hunt for the Nazi Gold Train: Exploring the Polish city of Walbrzych, where a fairy-tale castle on a cliff conceals a vast subterranean tunnel network linked to a legend of lost Nazi gold.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Fort Sherman, a jungle stronghold in Panama built to defend a prized American possession that soon faced the threat of an elaborate Nazi conspiracy.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Classic sitcom with the great Michael Crawford. Frank has a bit of hanging around to do in this episode, as the Spencers go for a picnic in Frank's new car.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Classic laughs with the hapless Frank Spencer. The sad tale of Frank's spell in the RAF is revealed. The great Fulton Mackay, of Porridge fame, guest stars.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Michael Crawford stars as the much impersonated Frank Spencer in the 1970s sitcom. Betty persuades Frank to take up a course in public relations.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Betty has to break the news to Frank that she is pregnant. Frank goes for a job at a holiday camp, pitching himself as a ventriloquist - oh dear.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Frank and Betty try to get some practice in looking after children by taking Judy and Alison to the zoo. Yes, it's the famous one with Frank on rollerskates.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: A truly classic episode of the 70s comedy in which Frank Spencer faces the dilemma of wife Betty and the cat giving birth at the same time. How to prioritise.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Seventies TV slapstick doesn't come any better than this. Frank can't believe the council has condemned their old house - even after all the DIY improvements he made.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Classic sitcom with the great Michael Crawford. Frank has a bit of hanging around to do in this episode, as the Spencers go for a picnic in Frank's new car.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Classic laughs with the hapless Frank Spencer. The sad tale of Frank's spell in the RAF is revealed. The great Fulton Mackay, of Porridge fame, guest stars.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Michael Crawford stars as the much impersonated Frank Spencer in the 1970s sitcom. Betty persuades Frank to take up a course in public relations.
